NFL Prospect Similarity Explorer

Select any 2026 prospect from the full class and this tool ranks historical comps using a weighted similarity score. The comparison pool only includes historical players with a valid ngs_score value. Similarity is based on column names, not column position, and uses only athleticism_score, size_score, production_score, ngs_score, and z_talent_within_pos. WAR, snap, height, weight, arm length, and hand size are shown for context.

athleticism_score
size_score
Similarity is based on weighted Euclidean distance using standardized differences on athleticism_score, size_score, production_score, ngs_score, and z_talent_within_pos only. Historical players are filtered to rows with a valid ngs_score before comping.
